2396170.name: Byte Wars
2396170.description:
Byte Wars is a strategic top-down rocket shooter where every shot counts. Take control of a spacecraft, rotate to aim, and launch a single rocket at a time, carefully navigating the pull of nearby planets that warp your trajectory in real time.

Players pilot a ship and fire one rocket at a time, requiring careful aim, as gravity from nearby planets dynamically alters rocket trajectories. Think before you shoot: accuracy are the keys to victory.

🛰️ Key Features:

  • Online Multiplayer – Compete in real-time Elimination and Team Deathmatch modes

  • Gravity Mechanics – Plan your rockets around planetary fields that curve and twist their paths

  • Player Progression – Earn score and climb the leaderboard

  • Customization – Equip your ship with visual cosmetics and power-ups for a personal edge

Byte Wars offers a unique, thoughtful twist on arcade shooting action.
